title: SilkTrials
description: Allows mining trial spawners with silk touch.
body:
**Mod Name**: **SilkTrials**  
**Version**: 1.21         
**Purpose**: Mine Trial Spawners with Silk Touch  
**Author**: [Raccoonism](https://modrinth.com/user/Raccoonism)    
**Release Date**: 18/09/2024

### ✅ What It Does
**SilkTrials** lets you mine trial spawners using silk touch pickaxes, making it easy to collect and use them in your Minecraft world.

### Why You Should Download It
- **Collect Trial Spawners**: Mine and collect trial spawners with silk touch pickaxes.
- **Flexible Use**: Place and use spawners in your builds and farms.

### Compatibility
The mod functions completely server-side, clients do not need the mod to join. However, you are able to install the mod client-side if you want to use the mod in singleplayer.

### Critical Information
Requires Minecraft 1.21 or above.  
Feel free to include this mod in any modpacks, no credit required :)
